signature.instructions: Given a git commit, produce documentation updates and a changelog entry.

fields.description: The git commit subject line (e.g. 'docs(masonry): Wave 19 synthesis')
Comma-separated list of files modified in this commit
Optional context about which documentation domains are affected

fields.prefix: Reasoning: Let's think step by step in order to

fields.description: Comma-separated list of documentation files that were written or updated
Single-line changelog entry summarising the documentation change
Quality score 0.0-1.0 as a decimal string (1.0 = accepted, 0.0 = reverted)
